query.text:
declare @ngay smalldatetime, @seq bit, @i int, @v1 nvarchar(33), @v2 nvarchar(33), @s char(1), @c varchar(1), @d varchar(32) select @ngay_nhap = right(rtrim(@ngay_nhap), 4) + substring(right(@ngay_nhap, 7), 1, 2) + left(@ngay_nhap, 2) select @ngay = convert(datetime, @ngay_nhap) select @d = convert(char(10), @ngay, 103)
select top 0 cast(0 as int) as id, ma_vt, ma_lo, ngay_nhap, ten_lo, ten_lo2, ngay_sx, ngay_hhsd, ngay_hhbh, ma_vt2, ghi_chu, so_ngay_sp, so_ngay_bh, kieu_lo, status into #d from vdmlo select top 0 id, ma_vt, ma_lo, status into #r from #d
select @seq = case when right(rtrim(val), 1) = '#' then 1 else 0 end from options where name = 'm_ma_lo_td'
set @i = 1 set @s = char(255) while @i <= dbo.FastBusiness$Function$GetWordCount(@ma_vt, @s) begin select @v1 = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$GetWordNum(@ma_vt, @i, @s), @v2 = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$GetWordNum(@ma_lo, @i, @s) select @c = case when @seq = 0 and @v2 = '' then '1' else '0' end insert into #r values(@i, @v1, @v2, @c)
select @i = @i + 1 end
select id, ma_vt, @ngay as ngay_nhap, ma_lo into #lot from #r where ma_lo = '' exec FastBusiness$Voucher$AutoCreateLot '#lot' update #r set ma_lo = a.ma_lo from #lot a where a.id = #r.id
insert into #d select a.id, a.ma_vt, a.ma_lo, @ngay, N'Lô ' + rtrim(upper(a.ma_lo)) + N' ngày nhập ' + @d, N'Lot ' + rtrim(upper(a.ma_lo)) + N' Received on ' + @d, @ngay, case when b.kieu_lo = 1 then (@ngay + b.so_ngay_sp) else null end, @ngay + b.so_ngay_bh, '', '', b.so_ngay_sp, b.so_ngay_bh, b.kieu_lo, a.status from #r a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt
select rtrim(ma_vt) as ma_vt, rtrim(upper(ma_lo)) as ma_lo, ngay_nhap, rtrim(ten_lo) as ten_lo, rtrim(ten_lo2) as ten_lo2, ngay_sx, ngay_hhsd, ngay_hhbh, rtrim(ma_vt2) as ma_vt2, rtrim(ghi_chu) as ghi_chu, so_ngay_sp, so_ngay_bh, kieu_lo, status from #d order by id
drop table #d drop table #r drop table #lot return
